summary:
## ⚡ Quick Summary

UK Electric Company Ltd. is a technical sales and distribution company specializing in HVAC, Electrical, and Process Controls and Automation products for commerce and industry. They distribute major branded HVAC control products, electrical control and panel building products, and energy control solutions, with particular strengths in Variable Speed Drives, Industrial control, Metering, Terminals and connectors, Valves, Enclosures, Actuators, and Protection devices.
